get.description: Returns every user in the in-memory store. Accessible by any valid role.

parameters.name: x-role
parameters.description: RBAC role header. Accepted values: admin | moderator | user. GET endpoints require any valid role. POST / PATCH / DELETE require admin.

post.description: Creates a user record. Requires x-role: admin.

parameters.name: x-role
parameters.description: RBAC role header. Accepted values: admin | moderator | user. GET endpoints require any valid role. POST / PATCH / DELETE require admin.

get.summary: Get a single user by ID
get.description: Fetches one user record by their numeric ID.

parameters.name: x-role
parameters.description: RBAC role header. Accepted values: admin | moderator | user. GET endpoints require any valid role. POST / PATCH / DELETE require admin.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Numeric user ID

patch.description: Partially updates a user (all fields optional). Requires x-role: admin.

parameters.name: x-role
parameters.description: RBAC role header. Accepted values: admin | moderator | user. GET endpoints require any valid role. POST / PATCH / DELETE require admin.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Numeric user ID to update

delete.description: Permanently deletes a user and cascades to their memberships, posts, and reports. Requires x-role: admin.

parameters.name: x-role
parameters.description: RBAC role header. Accepted values: admin | moderator | user. GET endpoints require any valid role. POST / PATCH / DELETE require admin.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Numeric user ID to delete

get.description: Returns all communities including enriched UI fields (icon, category, slug, memberCount, onlineCount).

parameters.name: x-role
parameters.description: RBAC role header. Accepted values: admin | moderator | user. GET endpoints require any valid role. DELETE requires admin.

post.description: Creates a new community. Any authenticated role may create a community.

parameters.name: x-role
parameters.description: RBAC role header. Accepted values: admin | moderator | user. GET endpoints require any valid role. DELETE requires admin.

requestBody.description: Community creation payload (name, description, ownerId, tags)

get.summary: Get a single community by ID
get.description: Fetches one community by its numeric ID, including all display fields.

parameters.name: x-role
parameters.description: RBAC role header. Accepted values: admin | moderator | user. GET endpoints require any valid role. DELETE requires admin.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Numeric community ID

patch.description: Partially updates a community. All fields are optional.

parameters.name: x-role
parameters.description: RBAC role header. Accepted values: admin | moderator | user. GET endpoints require any valid role. DELETE requires admin.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Numeric community ID to update

delete.description: Permanently deletes a community and cascades to related memberships and events. Requires x-role: admin.

parameters.name: x-role
parameters.description: RBAC role header. Accepted values: admin | moderator | user. GET endpoints require any valid role. DELETE requires admin.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Numeric community ID to delete

get.description: Returns all events. Optionally filter by status query param (upcoming | past | cancelled).

parameters.name: x-role
parameters.description: RBAC role header. Accepted values: admin | moderator | user. GET / POST require any valid role. PATCH requires admin or moderator. DELETE requires admin.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter events by status

post.description: Creates a new event linked to a community. Any authenticated role may create events.

parameters.name: x-role
parameters.description: RBAC role header. Accepted values: admin | moderator | user. GET / POST require any valid role. PATCH requires admin or moderator. DELETE requires admin.

get.summary: Get a single event by ID
get.description: Fetches one event by its numeric ID.

parameters.name: x-role
parameters.description: RBAC role header. Accepted values: admin | moderator | user. GET / POST require any valid role. PATCH requires admin or moderator. DELETE requires admin.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Numeric event ID

patch.description: Partially updates an event (all fields optional). Requires x-role: admin or moderator.

parameters.name: x-role
parameters.description: RBAC role header. Accepted values: admin | moderator | user. GET / POST require any valid role. PATCH requires admin or moderator. DELETE requires admin.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Numeric event ID to update

403.description: Only admin or moderator can update events

delete.description: Permanently deletes an event. Requires x-role: admin.

parameters.name: x-role
parameters.description: RBAC role header. Accepted values: admin | moderator | user. GET / POST require any valid role. PATCH requires admin or moderator. DELETE requires admin.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Numeric event ID to delete

get.description: Returns all reports. Only accessible by admin or moderator roles.

parameters.name: x-role
parameters.description: RBAC role header. Accepted values: admin | moderator | user. GET requires admin or moderator. POST requires any valid role. PATCH status requires admin or moderator. DELETE requires admin.

403.description: Only admin or moderator can view reports

post.description: Creates a new report (content or user report). Any authenticated role may submit a report. Status defaults to "pending".

parameters.name: x-role
parameters.description: RBAC role header. Accepted values: admin | moderator | user. GET requires admin or moderator. POST requires any valid role. PATCH status requires admin or moderator. DELETE requires admin.

requestBody.description: Report submission payload (reporterId, targetType, targetId, reason)

201.description: The newly submitted report with status: pending

patch.description: Advances a report through the status lifecycle: pending → reviewed → resolved. Requires x-role: admin or moderator.

parameters.name: x-role
parameters.description: RBAC role header. Accepted values: admin | moderator | user. GET requires admin or moderator. POST requires any valid role. PATCH status requires admin or moderator. DELETE requires admin.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Numeric report ID

requestBody.description: New status value. Allowed: pending | reviewed | resolved

403.description: Only admin or moderator can update report status

delete.description: Permanently removes a report record. Requires x-role: admin.

parameters.name: x-role
parameters.description: RBAC role header. Accepted values: admin | moderator | user. GET requires admin or moderator. POST requires any valid role. PATCH status requires admin or moderator. DELETE requires admin.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Numeric report ID to delete
